chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-252 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 15.09.2025 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate a/w the Petitioner. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Sardar Ali, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. ------ The petitioner has filed this petition for issuing of rule nisi for the recovery of alleged detainee Talib Hussain Buriro, who is uncle of the petitioner. On notices, S.H.O. P.S. Kamber-city has filed his statement on 04.09.2025, wherein it is stated that the dispute between the parties is regarding alleged abduction of Mst. Naziran, daughter of private respondent Ghulam Shabir, for which an F.I.R. bearing Crime No.266/2025 was recorded by Ghulam Shabir under sections 458, 496-A, 363, 34 P.P.C & 3 TIP Act, 2018 against accused Akbar and others and per report that after filing of this petition, they have conducted raid on the house of Ghulam Shabir, but couldn’t find alleged detainee Talib Hussain Buriro. The report further reflected that the alleged detainee was not recovered by the concerned S.H.O. However, it transpired from the statement that they were making efforts to recover the alleged detainee Talib Hussain Buriro. In the given circumstances, this petition is disposed of. However, S.S.P. Kamber-Shahdadkot is directed to conduct an enquiry into the matter and if during enquiry it transpired that alleged detainee Talib Hussain is detained by any private respondent or official respondent, he shall ensure that the alleged detainee is recovered and produced before the Court of law having jurisdiction within a period of 30 days from receipt of this order.

However, S.S.P. Kamber-Shahdadkot is directed to conduct an enquiry into the matter and if during enquiry it transpired that alleged detainee Talib Hussain is detained by any private respondent or official respondent, he shall ensure that the alleged detainee is recovered and produced before the Court of law having jurisdiction within a period of 30 days from receipt of this order. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Let copy of this order be sent through fax today to the S.S.P. Kamber-Shahdadkot for compliance. Judge Manzoor
